name: build_check_icon
outcome_goal: An SVG checkmark icon written to artifacts/icon_check.svg.

jobs.label: write_check_icon_svg
jobs.prompt:
Write a small SVG checkmark icon to `artifacts/icon_check.svg`.

Requirements:
- viewBox: `0 0 64 64`
- a green checkmark stroke (color `#16a34a`, stroke-width 8, stroke-linecap round, stroke-linejoin round, fill none)
- transparent background
- self-contained (no external CSS, no scripts)

Output just the file. No prose, no explanation.
